subject: Fermi GBM trigger 150805556 is not a GRB
body:
O.J. Roberts (UCD) reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 460473677/150805556
at 13:21:13.51 UT on the 5th of August 2015, tentatively classified
as a GRB, is in fact not due to a GRB. This trigger is due to local
particles."
